prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年复旦大学在山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约776名、780名、890名、1098名、890名。整体呈波动上升趋势，2024年达到峰值1098名后2025年回落至890名，近两年波动幅度约200名。2025年基准位次约890名；复旦大学在山东省综合类招生计划：2021年65人、2022年64人、2023年66人、2024年72人、2025年73人，呈逐年小幅扩招趋势。2026年计划招生91人，较2025年增加18人，扩招幅度约24.7%，为近五年最大扩招幅度。扩招将直接拉低录取门槛，使最低位次数字增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 复旦大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年位列第5名（2021年第6名，2022–2026年稳定第5名），稳居全国顶尖高校前列，对高分考生具有极强吸引力；2026年声誉评价为偏负面（主要涉及师德师风、学校管理相关事件），但2025年声誉评价为偏正面（科研成果重大荣誉）。抖音热度排名第4（高热），综合热度约1074万，样本视频19条，关注度极高。投档异常方面，2022年河南理科投档线暴跌（中关注），2023年新闻传播学类专业位次下滑（高关注），但均为外省事件，对山东考生直接影响有限。整体声誉偏负面可能轻微抑制报考热度，但抖音高热和顶尖层次形成对冲；复旦大学第五轮学科评估A+学科11个（中国史、中国语言文学、公共卫生与预防医学、哲学、政治学、数学、新闻传播学、物理学、理论经济学、生物学、马克思主义理论），A学科10个，A-学科6个，A-及以上共27个学科。数学A+、物理学A+、新闻传播学A+、理论经济学A+、生物学A+等王牌学科与招生专业高度对应，对考生有显著吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 山东省2026年高考考生总数约72万人，较2025年68.1万人增加约3.9万人，增幅约5.7%，考生规模持续扩大，竞争加剧。；复旦大学位于上海市，属一线城市，对山东考生有较强地域吸引力。该校在山东省招生计划占比较小（2025年73人，占全国计划比例有限），跨省竞争格局下山东考生需与全国考生竞争。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合以上因素：2025年基准位次约890名，2026年大幅扩招24.7%（91人 vs 73人）是影响录取位次的最关键因素，将显著拉低门槛使位次数字增大；山东省考生增加约5.7%进一步加剧竞争；声誉偏负面有轻微抑制但影响有限。学校Top5层次和抖音高热形成强支撑，部分抵消扩招影响。经综合权衡，预测2026年最低录取位次约1052名，波动区间932–1172名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约1052名，区间932–1172名。位次在区间下限（932名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（相辉学堂、集成电路领军班等）；位次在区间中段（950–1050名）建议以二档为主（数学英才班、物理英才班、经济学类等），兼顾一档冲刺；位次在区间上限（1100名以上）建议以三档保底为主（人文科学试验班、新闻传播学类、法学等），争取二档中位次要求较低的专业。复旦大学学科实力极强，各档专业均有A类学科支撑，报考价值高。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Fudan University in Shandong Province's comprehensive category were approximately 776, 780, 890, 1098, and 890 respectively. The overall trend shows a fluctuating increase, peaking at 1098 in 2024 before dropping to 890 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 200 places in the last two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 890. The enrollment plan for Fudan University in Shandong's comprehensive category: 65 in 2021, 64 in 2022, 66 in 2023, 72 in 2024, and 73 in 2025, showing a gradual small-scale expansion trend. The planned enrollment for 2026 is 91, an increase of 18 from 2025, with an expansion rate of about 24.7%, the largest in the past five years. This expansion will directly lower the admission threshold, increasing the minimum ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fudan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 5th (6th in 2021, stable at 5th from 2022 to 2026), firmly among the top universities in the country, strongly attracting high-scoring students. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly negative (mainly related to teacher ethics, school management incidents), but for 2025 it was slightly positive (major scientific research achievements). Douyin popularity ranks 4th (high heat), with a comprehensive heat index of about 10.74 million, 19 sample videos, and extremely high attention. Regarding abnormal admissions, the 2022 Henan science admission line plummeted (medium attention), and the 2023 Journalism and Communication major ranking dropped (high attention), but these are incidents in other provinces with limited direct impact on Shandong candidates. The overall slightly negative reputation may mildly suppress application enthusiasm, but high Douyin heat and top-tier status create a counterbalance. Fudan University has 11 A+ disciplines in the fifth round of discipline evaluation (Chinese History, Chinese Language and Literature, Public Health and Preventive Medicine, Philosophy, Political Science, Mathematics, Journalism and Communication, Physics, Theoretical Economics, Biology, Marxist Theory), 10 A disciplines, 6 A- disciplines, totaling 27 disciplines at A- or above. Flagship disciplines such as Mathematics A+, Physics A+, Journalism and Communication A+, Theoretical Economics A+, and Biology A+ highly correspond to admission majors, significantly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of Gaokao candidates in Shandong Province is about 720,000, an increase of about 39,000 from 685,000 in 2025, an increase of about 5.7%. The candidate scale continues to expand, intensifying competition. Fudan University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, which has strong regional appeal to Shandong candidates. The university's enrollment plan in Shandong Province accounts for a small proportion (73 in 2025, limited share of the national plan). Under the cross-provincial competition pattern, Shandong candidates need to compete with candidates nationwide.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the above factors: the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 890, and the significant expansion of 24.7% in 2026 (91 vs 73) is the most critical factor affecting admission rankings, significantly lowering the threshold and increasing the ranking number. The increase of about 5.7% in Shandong candidates further intensifies competition. The slightly negative reputation has a mild suppressive effect but limited impact. The school's Top 5 status and high Douyin heat provide strong support, partially offsetting the expansion effect. After comprehensive weighing, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 1052, with a fluctuation range of 932–1172.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 1052, range 932–1172. Candidates with rankings at the lower limit (within 932) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Xianghui Academy, Integrated Circuit Leading Class, etc.); candidates with rankings in the middle range (950–1050) are advised to focus on Tier 2 (Mathematics Talent Class, Physics Talent Class, Economics Class, etc.), while also attempting Tier 1; candidates with rankings at the upper limit (above 1100) are advised to mainly use Tier 3 as a safety net (Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class, Journalism and Communication Class, Law, etc.), and strive for Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements. Fudan University has extremely strong disciplinary strength, with A-class disciplines supporting each tier, offering high application value.
